# Lewis Drywall & Painting

> Painter serving Pittsfield, MA and surrounding areas. Lewis Drywall & Painting provides quality painter services in Pittsfield, MA. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Lewis Drywall & Painting
- Category: Painter
- Location: Serving Pittsfield, MA, Pittsfield, MA
- Phone: +1 413-418-5993
- Email: contact@lewis-drywall-painting.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Interior Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/lewis-drywall-painting//services/interior/): Professional interior painting for homes and businesses.
- [Exterior Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/lewis-drywall-painting//services/exterior/): Exterior house painting and staining.
- [Cabinet Painting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/lewis-drywall-painting//services/cabinet/): Cabinet refinishing and painting.
- [Drywall](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/lewis-drywall-painting//services/drywall/): Drywall repair and installation.
- [Wallpaper](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/lewis-drywall-painting//services/wallpaper/): Wallpaper removal and installation.
- [Deck Staining](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/painter/lewis-drywall-painting//services/deck/): Deck and fence staining.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all painter services.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Pittsfield, MA and surrounding communities.
- **How quickly can you respond?** We offer same-day and 24/7 emergency service for urgent issues.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** Yes, we stand behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
